insights: Facsimile/printed signatures rejected 28.6% (4/14); authentic on-card autos in confirmations command 80%+ discount spreads.
Multi-player or incomplete set listings rejected 21.4% (3/14); single-player authentic cards confirmed.
Novelty/reprint/custom flags reject 21.4% (3/14); vintage/licensed products in confirmations.
Wrong player/card/parallel mismatches rejected 28.6% (4/14); title-to-card alignment critical for snipes.
Confirmed snipes feature authentic signature products (Topps Tribute, Authentic Images Gold Foil) vs rejected facsimile/gold-plated variants.
Price anomalies ('other' reason) tagged 28.6% (4/14); confirmations show legitimately underpriced authentic autos.
Emojis/hype language ('🔥🚀⭐️') correlates with rejection; confirmed titles use clean, card-accurate descriptions.
Set products and bulk listings universally rejected; snipes target individual authentic autograph cards.
